name: obris
description: Connect your Obris knowledge base to Codex. Access topics and knowledge via MCP, sync files to local directories via CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Your knowledge, in every Codex conversation.
interface.longDescription: Obris keeps your knowledge in one place and makes it available everywhere you talk to AI. This plugin gives Codex direct access to your Obris topics over MCP and bundles a CLI sync workflow so any directory can mirror a topic on disk.
defaultPrompt: Sync this directory to one of my Obris topics
Save this conversation back to Obris
